name: Creamy Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghetti according to package directions.
2. Meanwhile, let cream cheese soften at room temperature in a small bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, blend the softened cream cheese with remaining ingredients (half and half, Parmesan cheese, chives, tuna, salt, and pepper) until smooth.
4. When the spaghetti is cooked, drain it and toss with butter.
5. Pile the spaghetti onto plates and top with the cream cheese-tuna mixture.
6. Sprinkle each serving generously with chopped parsley.
